name: AVALON HOLDINGS CORP
summary: Avalon Holdings Corporation operates two business segments: waste management services and golf and related operations. Waste management includes hazardous and nonhazardous waste disposal brokerage, captive landfill management, and saltwater injection well operations serving industrial, commercial, municipal, and governmental customers in northeastern and midwestern U.S. markets. Golf and related operations include four golf courses, a hotel (The Grand Resort), fitness centers, tennis courts, salon and spa, dermatology center, and dining and banquet facilities.
